response: DataFlow AI, a startup founded in 2022, is currently in its Series A funding stage, having raised $8.5 million and achieving a valuation of $42 million. With a team of 18 people, the company operates in the data infrastructure sector and boasts a monthly recurring revenue of $120,000, experiencing impressive growth of 25% month-over-month. Notable investors include Sequoia and Y Combinator (YC).
